title: Cal (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cal''' could refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Cal Alder]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] scout
*[[Cal Kestis]], a [[Padawan|Jedi Padawan]] who served the [[Jedi Order]] in the [[Clone Wars]] and survived [[Order 66]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*[[Cal (Jedi)|Cal]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*[[Cal (Rebel)]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]
*[[Cal (mercenary)]], a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who worked for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]
*[[Cal Alder/Legends|Cal Alder]], Rebel Alliance scout
*[[Cal Majjer]], business owner
*[[Cal Omas]], last [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and first [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]
*[[Cal-i-Vaun]], Jedi
*[[Lucinta Cal-Meg]], physics professor

===Ships===
*[[Cal-class battleship|''Cal''-class battleship]]
**''[[Cal Ambre]]''

===Locations===
*[[Tibrin system|Cal system]]
**[[Cal (star)]]
*[[Cal-Seti/Legends|Cal-Seti]], a planet in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].
*[[Hordon Cal]], a planet in the Core Worlds.

===Other===
*[[Vor-cal]]
*[[Cal-serpent]]
